rulings.Case Title: MARTHA CASSELMAN VS. TUYEN TRUONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Otion To Compel Site Inspection ; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs TUYEN TRUONG and ANNA TRUONG Motion To Compel Site Inspection; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff. Deny, failed to comply with CCP 2025.040. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA CASSELMAN VS. TUYEN TRUONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deposition Of Pltf.; Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Her Attorney Steven Macdonald ; Memo Of P & A; Dec.; Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs TUYEN TRUONG and ANNA TRUONG's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorney Steven Macdonald. Deny, failed to comply with CCP 2031.310 and 2016.040. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BAC VS. JOSE R HERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT REMBERTO ARTEAGA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar. First Amended Complaint filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KUMIKO TANAKA et al VS. MONICA HALLQUIST et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs MONICA HALLQUIST and CHARLES ALADO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Notices are fatally defective. Contain contradictory information plus one fails to state rent due. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERB THOMAS VS. HOLLIS BARNES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT HOLLIS BARNES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled, five days to answer. Failed to sustain burden that 827 not applicable to tenancies at will. = (501/REQ)
